title: Media Sales
description:
Media/Public Relations Sales

Media & Public Relations Sales Executive / Manager
(Seniority depends on experience)

About the Role

We are looking for a results-driven Media & Public Relations Sales professional to represent our media platforms and PR solutions to brands, founders, and decision-makers.

Your role is to sell influence, exposure, and brand positioning through media features, interviews, PR placements, and integrated campaigns across our media ecosystem.

This role is not order-taking. You will be expected to create demand, manage relationships, and close deals.

Key Responsibilities

Sales & Revenue Growth

  • Sell media features, interviews, PR placements, branded content, and campaign packages

  • Identify and pursue new business opportunities (outbound & inbound)

  • Manage full sales cycle: prospecting → pitching → proposal → closing

  • Hit monthly and quarterly revenue targets

Client Advisory & Pitching

  • Understand client goals (branding, awareness, credibility, lead generation)

  • Propose suitable media & PR solutions aligned with client objectives

  • Conduct sales meetings, presentations, and negotiations confidently

  • Position media exposure as a business investment, not a cost

Account & Relationship Management

  • Build long-term relationships with founders, marketers, and brand owners

  • Upsell and cross-sell additional media or PR opportunities

  • Ensure smooth handover to operations/content team after closing

Sales Operations & Reporting

  • Maintain accurate CRM records (leads, pipeline, follow-ups)

  • Track activity KPIs: outreach, meetings, proposals, conversions

  • Provide weekly sales updates and forecasts

Requirements

Experience & Skills

  • 1–5+ years experience in media sales, advertising sales, PR sales, or B2B services sales

  • Strong communication, persuasion, and presentation skills

  • Comfortable selling intangible value (branding, influence, exposure)

  • Proven ability to close deals and hit targets

  • Able to handle objections and price discussions professionally

Mindset & Traits

  • Hungry, accountable, and results-oriented

  • Comfortable with outreach, follow-ups, and rejection

  • Commercially sharp with strong business sense

  • Organised, disciplined, and self-motivated

Bonus If You Have

  • Existing network of brands, founders, SMEs, or agencies

  • Experience selling digital media, influencer marketing, or PR retainers

  • Understanding of social media, content marketing, or branding

  • Ability to package and upsell campaigns

Compensation & Benefits

  • Competitive base salary

  • Attractive commission structure (uncapped)

  • Performance bonuses

  • Clear growth path into Senior Sales / Sales Lead / Business Development roles

Performance Expectations (Transparent & Fair)

  • Clear monthly revenue targets

  • Measurable activity KPIs (outreach, meetings, proposals)

  • Accountability through weekly sales reporting

High performers are rewarded. Low performance is addressed early and clearly.

Why Join Us

  • Work with premium brands and high-growth businesses

  • Sell meaningful visibility and influence, not commodities

  • Be part of a fast-growing media ecosystem

  • Direct access to leadership and fast decision-making
